title: Apple (NASDAQ:AAPL) Shares Up 2% - Should You Buy? - MarketBeat
full_text: Apple Inc. (NASDAQ:AAPL) shares rose 2% on Friday, trading at $252.29. This comes amidst various analyst ratings, with a consensus of "Moderate Buy" and a target price of $248.29. The article also details recent financial performance, dividend announcements, insider stock sales by CEO Timothy D. Cook, and institutional investor activity.
